zh.Nottinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: Sir William De Thorpe於1390年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾。他和Margaret De Thorpe至少有1個兒子。他去世於1319年在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Nottinghamshire, England: 英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir William De Thorpe于1390年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾。他和Margaret De Thorpe至少有1个儿子。他去世于1319年在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Thorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire and Lancashire): from Middle English thorp(e) ‘village, hamlet, farmstead’ (Old Norse, Old English thorp ‘secondary settlement’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in such a settlement, or habitational, for someone from any of several places called Thorp(e), which are most frequent in Yorkshire, the Midlands, and East Anglia. Compare Throop .

variants.name: Trupp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Hermann, Reinhold.

English (Herefordshire and Monmouthshire): variant of   Thorpe  , or from a place so named, such as Thrupp (Berkshire, Gloucestershire, Oxfordshire), Thrupe (Somerset), Throop (Dorset, Hampshire, Somerset), and Throope (Wiltshire).

variants.name: Throop
meanings: English: from Middle English throp ‘village, hamlet, farmstead’ (Old Norse, Old English throp ‘secondary settlement’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in such a settlement, or habitational, for someone from Throop in Hampshire, Throope in Wiltshire, Thrup in Oxfordshire, or any of the places called Thrupp in Berkshire, Gloucestershire, and Northamptonshire. Compare Thorpe .

variants.name: Tharpe
meanings: English (Kent): variant of   Thorpe  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Thorp
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Thorpe  .

variants.name: Troup
meanings: Scottish (eastern): habitational name from a place in the parish of Gamrie, near Banff. The placename is unexplained, perhaps a Pictish cognate of Welsh trwp ‘vessel, dish, basin’.
Possibly also English, a metathesized form of   Thorpe  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Sir William De Thorpe was born in 1390, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son with Margaret De Thorpe. He died in 1319, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir William De Thorpe est né en 1390, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Margaret De Thorpe. Il est décédé en 1319, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Sir William De Thorpe wurde 1390 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mit Margaret De Thorpe mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1319 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Sir William De Thorpe è nato il nel 1390 nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Margaret De Thorpe. Morì nel 1319, nel sua cittadina.

ja.Nottinghamshire, England: イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir William De Thorpeは1390年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた。彼はMargaret De Thorpeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1319年に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William De Thorpe(은)는 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났다. 그는 Margaret De Thorpe(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1319년 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir William De Thorpe nasceu em 1390, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Margaret De Thorpe. Ele faleceu em 1319, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir William De Thorpe родился в 1390 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Margaret De Thorpe. Он умер в 1319 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Sir William De Thorpe nació en 1390, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Margaret De Thorpe. Murió en 1319, en su pueblo.
